creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: olgeni
Date: Sat Aug 24 20:04:01 2013
New Revision: 325310
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/325310

Log:
  Upgrade to version 3.1.5.
  
  PR:		ports/180389 (plus local changes)
  Submitted by:	Anton Yuzhaninov <ayuzhaninov@openstat.ru>
  Approved by:	maintainer timeout

Modified:
  head/net/rabbitmq/Makefile
  head/net/rabbitmq/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/net/rabbitmq/files/patch-rabbitmqctl   (contents, props changed)
  head/net/rabbitmq/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/net/rabbitmq/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net/rabbitmq/Makefile	Sat Aug 24 19:55:58 2013	(r325309)
+++ head/net/rabbitmq/Makefile	Sat Aug 24 20:04:01 2013	(r325310)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	rabbitmq
-PORTVERSION=	3.0.4
+PORTVERSION=	3.1.5
 CATEGORIES=	net
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.rabbitmq.com/releases/rabbitmq-server/v${PORTVERSION}/
 DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}-server-${PORTVERSION}
@@ -17,9 +17,10 @@ BUILD_DEPENDS=	erl:${PORTSDIR}/lang/erla
 		zip:${PORTSDIR}/archivers/zip
 RUN_DEPENDS=	erl:${PORTSDIR}/lang/erlang
 
-USE_GMAKE=	yes
-USE_PYTHON=	yes
+USES=		gmake shebangfix
+USE_PYTHON_BUILD=yes
 USE_RC_SUBR=	rabbitmq
+SHEBANG_FILES=	plugins-src/rabbitmq-amqp1.0/codegen.py
 
 USERS=	rabbitmq
 GROUPS=	rabbitmq
@@ -39,6 +40,13 @@ post-patch:
 		${SCRIPTS_DIR}/rabbitmq-server ${SCRIPTS_DIR}/rabbitmqctl \
 		${SCRIPTS_DIR}/rabbitmq-env ${SCRIPTS_DIR}/rabbitmq-plugins \
 		${SCRIPTS_DIR}/rabbitmq-defaults
+	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|VERSION=0.0.0|VERSION=${PORTVERSION}|g' \
+		${WRKSRC}/plugins-src/rabbitmq-erlang-client/Makefile \
+		${WRKSRC}/plugins-src/release.mk
+	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|VERSION:=0.0.0|VERSION:=${PORTVERSION}|g' \
+		${WRKSRC}/plugins-src/Makefile
+	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|VERSION?=0.0.0|VERSION?=${PORTVERSION}|g' \
+		${WRKSRC}/Makefile
 	@${FIND} ${WRKSRC} -name "*.bak" -delete
 
 pre-install:

Modified: head/net/rabbitmq/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/net/rabbitmq/distinfo	Sat Aug 24 19:55:58 2013	(r325309)
+++ head/net/rabbitmq/distinfo	Sat Aug 24 20:04:01 2013	(r325310)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (rabbitmq-server-3.0.4.tar.gz) = e49dbcfd8b2085133847de33081e2defb1f4879d21a9776d54ab1f1988e0e163
-SIZE (rabbitmq-server-3.0.4.tar.gz) = 3314866
+SHA256 (rabbitmq-server-3.1.5.tar.gz) = c6952bdd0f0d9551fa4a068e65ad6506583a3e81babbb4e4747e0073366a6c35
+SIZE (rabbitmq-server-3.1.5.tar.gz) = 3562221

Modified: head/net/rabbitmq/files/patch-rabbitmqctl
==============================================================================
--- head/net/rabbitmq/files/patch-rabbitmqctl	Sat Aug 24 19:55:58 2013	(r325309)
+++ head/net/rabbitmq/files/patch-rabbitmqctl	Sat Aug 24 20:04:01 2013	(r325310)
@@ -1,11 +1,14 @@
---- scripts/rabbitmqctl.orig	2011-08-01 15:59:26.057347310 +0100
-+++ scripts/rabbitmqctl	2011-08-01 16:00:07.303513263 +0100
-@@ -20,7 +20,7 @@
- [ "x" = "x$RABBITMQ_NODENAME" ] && RABBITMQ_NODENAME=${NODENAME}
- [ "x" = "x$RABBITMQ_CTL_ERL_ARGS" ] && RABBITMQ_CTL_ERL_ARGS=${CTL_ERL_ARGS}
+
+$FreeBSD$
+
+--- scripts/rabbitmqctl.orig
++++ scripts/rabbitmqctl
+@@ -26,7 +26,7 @@
  
--exec erl \
-+HOME=/var/db/rabbitmq exec erl \
+ ##--- End of overridden <var_name> variables
+ 
+-exec ${ERL_DIR}erl \
++HOME=/var/db/rabbitmq exec ${ERL_DIR}erl \
      -pa "${RABBITMQ_HOME}/ebin" \
      -noinput \
      -hidden \
